name: Tactical Scan
description: Context Bar (secondaryResource, 0–100) fills 4–8% per opponent action. Thresholds are live checks against current bar value. 30%: dodge → 40%. 70%: dodge → 55%, deflect 30% at 15% chance. 100%: dodge → 60%, deflect 35% at 18%, crit 10% at 300% attacker STR. Engine needs: onOpponentAction event; secondaryAbove condition; threshold status management.
